_meta.description: Operational expense reference catalog for the StratOS Action Plan agent. Each activity the LLM generates is classified into exactly one archetype; Python (not the LLM) looks up the base cost and computes the inflated figure. Numbers are deliberately round and seeded from the historical NU ITCS 2020-2024 plan thresholds (30k / 50k / 75k / 100k / 200k / 1M / 1.5M EGP).

cost_driver_meaning.local: Cost rises with domestic CPI inflation.
cost_driver_meaning.usd_linked: Cost rises with EGP/USD depreciation (imported hardware, licenses, international travel).

funding_source_meaning.faculty_opex: Charged against the faculty's strategic operating envelope (counts toward the 5% ceiling).
funding_source_meaning.central_capex: Funded centrally by the university (excluded from the faculty 5% envelope; real cost still recorded).

faculty_training_workshop.label: Faculty / staff training workshop
faculty_training_workshop.description: Internal training, CPD sessions, pedagogy or skills workshops for faculty and teaching assistants.

student_outreach_campaign.label: Student outreach / recruitment campaign
student_outreach_campaign.description: School visits, open days, orientation, advising drives, and student-facing awareness activities.

scholarship_financial_aid.label: Scholarship / financial aid initiative
scholarship_financial_aid.description: Merit or need-based tuition support, prizes, and grants awarded to students.

academic_event_conference.label: Academic event / conference / seminar
academic_event_conference.description: Hosting conferences, symposia, competitions, hackathons, or guest-lecture series.

international_mou_partnership.label: International MoU / partnership
international_mou_partnership.description: Establishing or operating exchange agreements, dual degrees, and cross-border collaborations (travel and hosting are dollar-sensitive).

marketing_branding.label: Marketing / branding / visibility
marketing_branding.description: Advertising, website/social media, promotional material, and competitive-feature visibility for programs.

accreditation_quality_prep.label: Accreditation / quality-assurance preparation
accreditation_quality_prep.description: Self-study preparation, NAQAAE documentation, program/course specification updates, internal audits and reviews.

software_license_tier_1.label: Software license (small / single-tool)
software_license_tier_1.description: A single licensed platform, LMS module, or specialised software subscription.

software_license_tier_2.label: Software license (large / suite or campus-wide)
software_license_tier_2.description: A suite of licensed tools, virtual labs, or a campus-scale software deployment.

lab_hardware_upgrade.label: Lab hardware upgrade
lab_hardware_upgrade.description: Servers, GPUs, lab equipment, and major imported hardware procurement (capital expenditure, funded centrally).

infrastructure_facility.label: Infrastructure / facility build or renovation
infrastructure_facility.description: Construction, renovation, new classrooms/labs/clinics, or major physical-space works (capital expenditure, funded centrally).

curriculum_program_development.label: Curriculum / program development
curriculum_program_development.description: Designing, developing, or substantially revising a curriculum, degree track, academic program, or operational framework — including drafting a new program/policy/framework PRIOR to its approval.

survey_assessment_study.label: Survey / assessment / evaluation study
survey_assessment_study.description: Conducting surveys, focus groups, satisfaction or graduate-tracer studies, benchmarking, data analysis, or program-effectiveness evaluation, plus the reporting built on them.

faculty_recruitment.label: Faculty / staff recruitment
faculty_recruitment.description: Recruiting or hiring faculty and supporting staff — national/international search and hiring campaigns and onboarding. NOT student recruitment (use student_outreach_campaign).

student_support_service.label: Student academic-support service
student_support_service.description: Support services for ENROLLED students — tutoring, mentoring, academic advising, language support, learning clubs, remediation. NOT faculty training, NOT recruitment.

it_system_deployment.label: IT system deployment / integration
it_system_deployment.description: Implementing, migrating, integrating, configuring, or upgrading a data/IT SYSTEM or platform (e.g., alumni-tracking, LMS setup) — the deployment labor, DISTINCT from purchasing a license (software_license_*).

administrative_routine.label: Routine administrative task
administrative_routine.description: STRICT, zero-budget governance ONLY: convening a committee/board, formally approving or ratifying an ALREADY-DESIGNED policy/document, enforcing an existing rule, or routine record-keeping. Do NOT use for designing, developing, drafting, studying, surveying, analyzing, evaluating, building, recruiting, or training — those consume real effort and belong to a specific archetype. If the activity PRODUCES something new, it is not administrative_routine.

general_initiative.label: General initiative (last-resort fallback)
general_initiative.description: LAST-RESORT FALLBACK — use ONLY after rejecting every other archetype. Re-check first: is it training, outreach, scholarship, event, MoU, marketing, accreditation/QA, software, hardware, infrastructure, curriculum/program development, a survey/assessment study, faculty recruitment, a student-support service, an IT-system deployment, or routine governance? If any fits even loosely, choose THAT. Never use this as a default for borderline items.
